/usr/bin/c++  -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/nba_backend.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/nba_backend.dir/src/players.cpp.o CMakeFiles/nba_backend.dir/src/calculator.cpp.o CMakeFiles/nba_backend.dir/src/comments.cpp.o CMakeFiles/nba_backend.dir/src/api.cpp.o -o nba_backend  /Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/SDKs/MacOSX.sdk/usr/lib/libsqlite3.tbd -framework CoreFoundation -framework Security
